final_prompt.prompt:
Create an interior illustration of a new-Chinese-style tea room space.

Style/medium: needs a "新中式" aesthetic with "禅意" mood — references in the spirit of 宋画 ink-and-color tradition, 明代文人家具 scholarly design heritage, 苏州园林 window-framing composition; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include window framing with bamboo shadows visible outside
Subject: must include 原木茶台 (one), 紫砂壶 and tea cups set, 盆景 (one)
Scene/backdrop: must include 书法卷轴 on the wall, window with 竹影婆娑 outside
Lighting/mood: needs a contemplative, serene atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs an earthy, muted direction — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: needs natural wood and ceramic surface treatment — exact grain and sheen is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
